nasb.text: He stationed the gatekeepers of the house of the Lord, so that no one would enter who was in any way unclean.

esv.text: He stationed the gatekeepers at the gates of the house of the Lord so that no one should enter who was in any way unclean.

cnv.text: 他又設立守門的看守耶和華殿的各門，無論為了甚麼事，不潔淨的人，都不能進去。

ccb.text: 耶何耶大还派门卫把守耶和华殿的各门，禁止一切不洁净的人入内。
